Izana My Castle recruitment timing - user verification
sources.location: User-provided Fire Emblem Fates gameplay verification
sources.notes: After the relevant route chapter and a level 3 Hot Spring, Izana joins when My Castle refreshes. Waiting for the real-time update works; completing a map is another way to advance the refresh.

sources.title: Flora/Izana level scaling??? - controlled Conquest testing
sources.notes: Player testing records the full Conquest level schedule, deterministic average-growth stat gains, automatic class skills, and a level 15 cap.

sources.title: FE14 parent-generation unit evaluation - Pegasus Knight
sources.notes: Japanese community reference identifying Izana, Flora, and Fuga as My Castle recruits whose joining levels rise with later recruitment. Its listed Conquest Izana minimum conflicts with controlled testing.

sources.title: Paragon FE14 extracted-data schemas
sources.notes: The CastleJoin and Chapter schemas expose route-specific castle recruitment chapters and chapter-level Offspring Seal scaling fields. Their coexistence supports describing the castle system as Offspring Seal-esque level scaling, but does not prove that castle recruits use the child unit Offspring Seal routine.

sources.title: Hoshidan Characters - Other Data - Serenes Forest
sources.notes: Izana's footnote states that later recruitment raises his weapon ranks and level, with level determining how many class skills he has.

sources.notes: Izana's footnote states that later recruitment raises his weapon ranks and level, with level determining how many class skills he has.

sources.title: Felicia Chapter 16 join state - user Nintendo 3DS verification
sources.location: User's physical Fire Emblem Fates save on Nintendo 3DS
sources.notes: Direct in-game observation: Felicia joins at Chapter 16 with C-rank daggers and staves and both proficiency bars approximately one-third filled toward B.

sources.title: Jakob Chapter 16 join state - user Nintendo 3DS verification
sources.location: User's physical Fire Emblem Fates save on Nintendo 3DS
sources.notes: Direct in-game observation: Jakob joins at Chapter 16 with C-rank daggers and staves and both proficiency bars approximately one-third filled toward B.

sources.title: Kaze Chapter 4 inventory - user verification
sources.location: User's direct Fire Emblem Fates verification
sources.notes: Kaze has a second Vulnerary when joining in Chapter 4 on Normal difficulty; Hard and Lunatic use one Vulnerary.

sources.title: Kaze Chapter 4-5 weapon proficiency carryover - user verification
sources.location: User's direct Fire Emblem Fates verification
sources.notes: Weapon proficiency earned by Kaze in Chapters 4 and 5 carries into his route-specific state alongside his level and stat gains.
